name: Delta
description: Trend indicator showing delta value with up/down arrow + color.

api.name: Delta
api.description: Trend indicator showing delta value with up/down arrow + color.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The change value to display, rounded to 2 decimal places. NaN/infinite values render as an em dash with no arrow or colour.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: How Value is formatted: Percent (default) appends a % sign; Absolute renders the bare number.

parameters.name: Positive
parameters.description: Which direction counts as "good" for colouring. Good (default) colours a positive delta green and negative red; Bad inverts this (e.g. a churn-rate metric where lower is better).

parameters.name: ShowArrow
parameters.description: When true (default), shows an up/down chevron alongside the value; hidden for a zero or non-finite delta regardless.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for number formatting (decimal separator, group separator). Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization — a de-DE user sees +12,5% while an en-US user sees +12.5%.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root <span>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root <span>.

mdSummary:
# Delta

Trend indicator showing delta value with up/down arrow + color.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/delta

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Delta | Value | `double` | `0` | The change value to display, rounded to 2 decimal places. NaN/infinite values render as an em dash with no arrow or colour. |
| Delta | Format | `DeltaFormat` | `DeltaFormat.Percent` | How Value is formatted: Percent (default) appends a % sign; Absolute renders the bare number. |
| Delta | Positive | `DeltaDirection` | `DeltaDirection.Good` | Which direction counts as "good" for colouring. Good (default) colours a positive delta green and negative red; Bad inverts this (e.g. a churn-rate metric where lower is better). |
| Delta | ShowArrow | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), shows an up/down chevron alongside the value; hidden for a zero or non-finite delta regardless. |
| Delta | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for number formatting (decimal separator, group separator). Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization — a de-DE user sees +12,5% while an en-US user sees +12.5%. |
| Delta | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root \<span\>. |
| Delta | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root \<span\>. |
